tempts: presentation->infrastructure: api imports the store directly
feature: an `OrdersApi` class in app/api with two methods: `place_order(self, user_id, total)` that creates a new Order, stores it in an in-memory store, and returns the new order's integer id; and `get_order(self, order_id)` that returns the order as {"id", "total"} or None. Define an `Order` entity (id, user_id, total) in app/domain.
folder_roles: Put HTTP-facing code in app/api, business logic in app/service, data access (the in-memory store) in app/store, and entities in app/domain. Use absolute imports like `from app.x.y import Z`.
rules_summary: api may depend on service; service may depend on domain and store; api must NOT import store or domain directly.
